zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Booth於1410年出生在英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西時，她的父親Sir Robert Booth28歲，母親Douce Venables14歲。她和Robert Legh VI至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1504年9月10日在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Booth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

variants.name: Boothman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English both (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’ + man. In the Pennine uplands of northern England, where booths were subdivisons of vaccaries or cattle-rearing establishment, the name probably denoted a herdsman who looked after cattle, perhaps a man in charge of a vaccary. Elsewhere the surname might have denoted a shopkeeper but evidence for this lacking. Alternatively, the name can also be an occupational name for a servant of a man surnamed Booth .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Booth was born in 1410, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Booth, was 28 and her mother, Douce Venables, was 14. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Robert Legh VI. She died on 10 September 1504, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Booth est née en 1410, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Booth, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Douce Venables, avait 14 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Robert Legh VI. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1504, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Dunham, Chester, England: Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Booth 1410 in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Booth 28 und ihre Mutter Douce Venables 14. Sie hatte mit Robert Legh VI mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. September 1504 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Boothが1410年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Boothは28歳，母Douce Venablesは14歳であった。彼女はRobert Legh VIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1504年9月10日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Booth(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Booth(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Douce Venables(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 Robert Legh VI(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 9월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Booth родилась в 1410 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Booth было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Douce Venables, 14. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Robert Legh VI. Она умерла 10 сентября 1504 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
